title: Platform Engineer (GCP)
description: Bloom Health is a digital health insurance company processing claims for 200k policyholders. We run our entire infrastructure on GCP and are building a platform team to give our 40-person engineering org an amazing developer experience. You'll own GKE, Cloud Run, CI/CD, and developer tooling.
responsibilities: Own GKE clusters and Cloud Run services for 40-engineer org
Build internal developer platform (IDP) with Backstage
Implement GCP cost management saving 20% cloud spend
Ensure GDPR and NHS Digital security standards compliance
